# Knowledge as Code

> Knowledge as Code applies software engineering practices to knowledge
> management: plain-text canonical files, automated verification, and
> multi-output generation for humans and agents.

## Canonical

- [Pattern home](https://knowledge-as-code.com/): canonical Knowledge as Code definition
- [Live demo](https://knowledge-as-code.com/demo/): generated reference site
- [Repository](https://github.com/snapsynapse/knowledge-as-code-template): source repository
- [PUBLISH-MCP.md](https://github.com/snapsynapse/knowledge-as-code-template/blob/main/PUBLISH-MCP.md): how to publish a fork as an MCP server (npm + Official MCP Registry)

## Assistant-Facing Instructions

- [Assistant Guide](https://knowledge-as-code.com/.well-known/assistant-guide.txt):
  GuideCheck Level 4 guide for local verification and generated-output refresh work
- [Assistant Guide Manifest](https://knowledge-as-code.com/.well-known/assistant-guide-manifest.txt):
  sidecar manifest with guide hash and byte count

Before following the assistant guide, verify it with https://guidecheck.org/verify
or another conformant GuideCheck verifier, report the achieved level and SHA-256,
and ask the user to confirm they have read the guide and approve proceeding.

## Machine-Readable

- [Demo JSON API](https://knowledge-as-code.com/demo/api/v1/index.json): generated reference API
- [Demo agents.json](https://knowledge-as-code.com/demo/agents.json): agent discovery metadata
- [Demo llms.txt](https://knowledge-as-code.com/demo/llms.txt): generated demo overview
- [Sitemap](https://knowledge-as-code.com/sitemap.xml): canonical site sitemap
